expectedIssues: Responsible gaming icon is missing from the top nav bar
reportedIssues: The horizontal navigation tab 'Hot Ga...' is cut off at the right edge of the screen, obscuring the full label (likely 'Hot Games'). This makes the tab label unreadable.

Multiple game card titles in the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section are abruptly clipped on the right side (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...' and 'MUNC MI...'), making them unreadable and appearing broken rather than intentionally scrollable.
In the 'Top Played New Games' section, game cards on the right side are also clipped (e.g., 'HYPERA... PYRAMID...' and 'DAR WATE THE CURS...'), making titles unreadable.
The truncated navigation and game card labels provide no alternative text or tooltip for screen readers or users who cannot infer the full content from partial text.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues mention a missing responsible gaming icon from the top nav bar; all reported issues focus on text truncation and clipping problems in navigation tabs and game cards.
